wordplay_note: A singing name for a boy on a musical adventure
card_description: Peter Trilling (meaning "Trilling = trilling/singing") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Nick and the Glimmung*. Boy who travels to the Plowman's Planet with his cat Horace. Name note: A singing name for a boy on a musical adventure. PKD's only children's book — wonder and danger on an alien world. First appears in *Nick and the Glimmung*.

reference.brief: Boy who travels to the Plowman's Planet with his cat Horace
reference.significance: PKD's only children's book — wonder and danger on an alien world
